dataList.name: Bearing of a Salsu
dataList.desc:
At 1 [Breath] Count, lose 10 HP instead of losing [Breath] Count (this effect cannot Stagger this unit and does not drop this unit's HP below 1)

Deal +(missing HP percentage on self / 2) damage on Critical Hit using Base Skills (max 50%)

dataList.name: A Breath Taken Together
dataList.desc:
When gaining [Breath] Potency using this unit's own Skills and Coin effects, apply 1 [Breath] on an ally that does not have [Breath] or has the lowest [Breath] Potency (5 times per turn)

Turn Start: If Bamboo-hatted Kim is on the field, gain 1 [SlashDamageUp] and +2 [Laceration] Count

dataList.name: The Last Breath
dataList.desc:
If this unit is defeated, apply 5 [Breath] and +2 [Breath] Count on all Blade Lineage allies at the next Turn Start

Turn Start: At 20+ [Breath] Potency, equip "Slash Series" on the leftmost Slot

dataList.name: The Last Breath
dataList.desc:
If this unit is defeated, apply 5 [Breath] and +2 [Breath] Count on all Blade Lineage allies at the next Turn Start

Turn Start: At 20+ [Breath] Potency, equip "Slash Series" on the leftmost Slot
